assessment_items.question_content:
**Duccio's *Maesta* shows [[☃ dropdown 1]] in the front row, 
[[☃ dropdown 2]] in the second row, [[☃ dropdown 3]] in the third row, and [[☃ dropdown 4]] at the top.**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f92e66a280f79b122fcb4bf54e43877f.png)
hints:
**Duccio's *Maesta* shows local saints from Siena in the front row, saints in the second row, angels in the third row, and apostles at the top.**

**[Watch this video to review](/humanities/medieval-world/latin-western-europe/siena-late-gothic/v/duccio-maesta-front-1308-11)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**The citizens of Siena believed that they owed their military victories to the divine patronage of  [[☃ dropdown 1]], who played the role of intercessor between humankind and God.**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f92e66a280f79b122fcb4bf54e43877f.png)
hints:
**The citizens of Siena believed that they owed their military victories to the divine patronage of the Virgin Mary, who played the role of intercessor between humankind and God. **

**[Watch this video to review](/humanities/medieval-world/latin-western-europe/siena-late-gothic/v/duccio-maesta-front-1308-11)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Duccio was interested in creating three-dimensional forms through [[☃ dropdown 1]].**



![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f92e66a280f79b122fcb4bf54e43877f.png)
hints:
**Duccio was interested in creating three-dimensional forms through light and shadow.**

**[Watch this video to review](/humanities/medieval-world/latin-western-europe/siena-late-gothic/v/duccio-maesta-front-1308-11)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**The back of Duccio's *Maesta* has many more panels that tell the story of [[☃ dropdown 1]].**


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ad3dc4f8fe8fbb0f318f0b0e67a89d48.png)
hints:
**The back of the *Maesta* has many more panels that tell the story of the life of Christ.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Duccio uses a [[☃ dropdown 1]] for crowd scenes, where figures in the back are larger than figures in the front.**
 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ce09b707dc6473596393e7f20f455bbf.png)
hints:
**Duccio uses a reverse perspective for crowd scenes, where figures in the back are larger than figures in the front.** 

**[Watch this video to review](/humanities/medieval-world/latin-western-europe/siena-late-gothic/v/duccio-maesta-back-1308-11)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**All of the scenes, on the back and front, have gold backgrounds, which is typical of the [[☃ dropdown 1]].**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f92e66a280f79b122fcb4bf54e43877f.png)

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ad3dc4f8fe8fbb0f318f0b0e67a89d48.png)
hints:
**All of the scenes, on the back and front, have gold backgrounds, typical of the Byzantine tradition.**
